creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Terry Kennedy from comment #13)

It's a WIP patch based on jsmith's one. denyhosts.conf patch added in https://people.FreeBSD.org/~sunpoet/patch/security-denyhosts-v2.txt

(In reply to Terry Kennedy from comment #14)

It's intentional. I use suffix here because it's not a python library.
- pyXX- prefix for python libraries.
- -pyXX suffix for applications.
